title: ZeroDot1/LLMWikiNG
summary: LLMWikiNG is a local, privacy-friendly wiki platform developed by ZeroDot1 and based on the Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern. The wiki is maintained and expanded by AI assistants—and you can easily read, search, and manage it right in your browser.

title: VinceGuyMan/MCAI
summary: Local Minecraft companion bot (Mineflayer + Paper, optional Ollama). Code-first iron-age helper for offline servers.

title: viraajbindra-a11y/Astrion-OS
summary: Astrion OS — AI-native operating system with 50 apps, native GTK3 shell, real terminal, Ollama AI, Flatpak app store. Runs on Surface Pro 6 and VMs.

title: hidr4lisk/swarm
summary: A multi-agent worktable in your browser: several AIs sit at one table — chat, debate and act — coordinated by a leader. Runs on your API keys or CLIs, installed or from a pendrive. Windows & Linux, no account, open source.

title: fru-dev3/prevail-desktop
summary: Private, local-first AI "life OS": any model per life-domain over a markdown vault on your machine. Council mode, open source (GPL-3.0).

title: jrodolfo/local-genai-lab
summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

title: ebongard/renfield
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant with voice satellites, 100+ tool integrations, RAG knowledge base, and full offline capability. Built with FastAPI + React + Ollama.

title: m5it/AIIA
summary: AIIA now is Code Agent and Architect and Generalist and a lot more...

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: Chunduri-Aditya/ai-health-journal
summary: Privacy-first local LLM journaling assistant using Flask + Ollama. All processing on localhost—no external APIs. Includes DPO fine-tuning pipeline.

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: llamastash/llamastash
summary: A fast terminal native app (TUI) and CLI with init wizard for launching local LLMs with zero overhead

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: Nolos510/local-ai-lab
summary: Local-first AI engineering lab for Apple Silicon: discover, fit-check, benchmark (5 local runtimes), compare, and decide on local LLMs — plus a private RAG backbone. Stdlib-only dashboard, approval-gated model execution, evidence-first.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: Building a personal AI that learns how you live and work, then gets better at knowing when and how to help. Local-first, any model.

title: 404Piyush/google-maps-review-analyzer
summary: This project scrapes and analyzes Google Maps reviews.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.
